narrative:
Fairborn 223 (precinct in Greene County) has 597 registered voters, with 71.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 14.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.4%, a narrow Republican lean of 1.5 percentage points.
